layout_settings.section_title: An Urban Retreat with a Majestic Backdrop
layout_settings.section_text: Framed by mountain horizons, city skylines, and park views, each residence is a private escape in the sky. Expansive windows bathe living spaces in natural light, inviting the outdoors in while preserving a deep sense of calm.

layouts.title: “This is an inspirational quote that shares the vision behind Park Row and its relationship with Bellevue.”

layout_settings.section_text: Interiors pair timeless materials with modern restraint: burnished wood, honed quartz, and a palette inspired by earth, air, and water. Every element— from proportion to finish—has been crafted with integrity and intention.

content.title: Living & Dining
content.text: Open, fluid layouts encourage connection and effortless entertaining. Natural textures meet refined detailing for warmth that feels contemporary yet enduring..

content.title: Kitchens
content.text: Thoughtfully composed around daily rituals. Integrated appliances, sculpted stone, and generous storage create spaces both functional and artful.

content.list:
Custom designed chef-par kitchens
Polished quartz countertops and backsplash
Custom designed quartz curved island with a convex detail
European-inspired wood veneer cabinets with integrated pulls
Undermount LED cabinet lighting for workspace illumination
Soft-close drawers and organizers for flatware and utensils
Deep utility drawers with glass sides
Convenient docking drawer with USB/USB-C outlet
One-bedroom residences include an integrated backlit glass pantry
8” deep single basin stainless steel sink
Polished dark chrome Dornbracht single lever faucet with pull-down spray and integrated soap dispenser

content.title: Bathrooms
content.text: Soft light, tactile surfaces, and a serene balance of form and function. A private spa that invites restoration at the beginning and end of each day.

content.list:
Primary Bathrooms
Cantilevered soft-close fluted wood veneer cabinets with interior outlet and undercabinet lighting
Dual undermount sinks with honed quartz vanity top
Illuminated vanity mirror with custom wall sconce and wall tile 
Modern large format tile flooring with heated floors
Curbless, glass enclosed shower with tiled niche and linear drain in 2 & 3-bedroom residences
Dornbracht wall mounted dark chrome fixtures including rain shower with hand shower system
Dark chrome accessories

Secondary Bathrooms
Cantilevered soft-close fluted wood veneer cabinets with undercabinet lighting
Undermount sink with honed quartz vanity top
Custom illuminated vanity mirror and wall sconce with wood wall detailing 
Porcelain wall and floor tile 
Dark chrome Dornbracht faucets and fixtures

Powder Bath
Soft-close fluted wood veneer cabinets with undercabinet lighting  
Undermount sink with honed quartz vanity top
